title: cestichis major
intro: Cestichis major, also known as Indian tinospora or giloe, is a medicinal plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is known for its unique properties as a medicinal herb, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing fever, treating various skin conditions, and aiding in the management of diabetes and cardiovascular diseases. Cestichis major can be prepared in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and dried extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
